description: The AxisRotationGizmo component is used for one of the any 3 axies of rotation for a rotation gizmo that can be interacted with through the Dev Tool.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to translate and edit.
fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to automatically position this at the target slot.
fields._interactingComponent: the component This is interacting with.
fields._material: The material being used for the visual.
fields._toolPoint: The point that follows the interacting tool's tip.
fields._activePoint: The point that follows the gizmo visual.
fields._lineRoot: the root of the line visual from the gizmo to the interacting tool's tip.
fields._lineSegment: The segment mesh being used for the line visual.
fields._snapHighlight: the root of the snap highlight for snapping.
fields.Axis: The direction of the 2d axis this will rotate along.
fields.RotationSpace: The coordinate space of the ``TargetRotation`` drive target.
fields.TargetRotation: A field to drive with the target rotation
fields.CircleRadius: The radius of the rotation circle gizmo.
fields.CircleThickness: The thickness of the torus of the rotation gizmo.
fields._visualRoot: The root slot of the visual for interaction.
fields._visualRot: The rotation field of the visual.
fields._circle: The torus mesh being used to make the rotation gizmo interact visual.
fields._circleColliderMesh: The collider for the circle rotation gizmo visual.
fields._linesRoot: The root of the visuals for the lines.
fields._line0: The line along the rotation plane to below the tooltip.
fields._line1: The line from the end of ``_line0`` to the tooltip.
